analysis.primary_subject: Stack of bamboo poles with visible cuts and ends

craftsmanship_quality.precision: Medium - The cuts on the bamboo poles are relatively straight but show some irregularities and unevenness.
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: Medium - The bamboo surfaces are natural and unpolished, with visible texture and some rough edges.
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: Low - The focus seems to be on the raw material rather than refined finishing details.

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This image showcases a stack of bamboo poles, highlighting the raw material stage in carpentry. The natural texture and rough cuts provide insight into the initial steps of working with bamboo.
